gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.C4 > 10 AND T1.Diagnosis = 'APS'
